definition:
σύμ-φυτος, -ον
 (συμφύω, to make to grow together) [in LXX: Zec.11:2 (בָּצַר), Est.7:7 Est.7:8 א2, Amo.9:13, 3Ma.3:22 * ;] 
  1. congenital, innate (Plat., al.; 3Mac, l.with). 
   2. grown along with, united with: τ. ὁμοιώματι τ. θανάτου αὐτσῦ (see Field, Notes, 155 f.), Rom.6:5.†
 (AS)
